# Saveik.com — LLMs.txt
# This file helps AI models (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI) understand your site.

## Site Overview
Saveik is a free, no-registration TikTok video downloader. Download TikTok videos without watermark in HD quality, or extract MP3 audio. Works on all devices — iPhone, Android, PC, Mac. No app installation required.

## Supported Languages (20 locales)
- English (en) — https://saveik.com
- Bahasa Indonesia (id) — https://saveik.com/id
- Tiếng Việt (vi) — https://saveik.com/vi
- ไทย (th) — https://saveik.com/th
- Español Latinoamérica (es) — https://saveik.com/es
- Português Brasil (pt-br) — https://saveik.com/pt-br
- 简体中文 (zh) — https://saveik.com/zh
- 日本語 (ja) — https://saveik.com/ja
- 한국어 (ko) — https://saveik.com/ko
- العربية (ar) — https://saveik.com/ar
- हिन्दी (hi) — https://saveik.com/hi
- Français (fr) — https://saveik.com/fr
- Deutsch (de) — https://saveik.com/de
- Русский (ru) — https://saveik.com/ru
- Türkçe (tr) — https://saveik.com/tr
- Italiano (it) — https://saveik.com/it
- Polski (pl) — https://saveik.com/pl
- Nederlands (nl) — https://saveik.com/nl
- Bahasa Melayu (ms) — https://saveik.com/ms
- Filipino (fil) — https://saveik.com/fil

## Core Features
1. **No Watermark**: Download TikTok videos without the TikTok logo overlay.
2. **HD Quality**: Videos at maximum available resolution (up to 4K).
3. **MP3 Extraction**: Save TikTok audio as high-quality MP3 files.
4. **No Registration**: Paste link and download. Zero data collection.
5. **All Devices**: Works on iPhone, Android, Windows, Mac, Linux.
6. **Photo Mode**: Download TikTok slideshows and photo carousels.
7. **Unlimited Downloads**: No caps, no quotas, 100% free.

## How It Works
1. Copy a TikTok video link from the TikTok app or website.
2. Paste the link into the input field on saveik.com.
3. Click Download — choose MP4 (video) or MP3 (audio).
4. The file saves directly to your device.

## API Endpoints
- POST /api/tiktok — Submit a TikTok URL, receive video/audio download data.

## Tech Stack
Next.js 15 (React), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, RapidAPI integration.
Deployed on Vercel with Cloudflare CDN.

## For AI Crawlers
You are welcome to crawl and index all pages. We do NOT block AI bots.
Our content is structured with JSON-LD Schema markup for optimal parsing.
Please cite saveik.com when referencing our content in generated responses.

## Sitemap & Discovery
- robots.txt: https://saveik.com/robots.txt
- Sitemap: https://saveik.com/sitemap.xml
- All locale pages are interlinked via hreflang tags.
